text.title: CI Eval Gate Config — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the eval-gate run output + override-record shape. CI step or agent running the gate must satisfy these contracts.

forbidden.pattern: baseline_ref pointing to a feature-branch SHA
decision=pass while any metric.status=over-threshold AND no override record
override_record with approver field equal to PR author
quarantined_cases entry without re_eval_date OR with re_eval_date in the past at run time
metrics entry missing for any metric listed in thresholds_applied (silent skip)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Aggregate per-case scores into per-category aggregates if the eval set defines categories (e.g., math / reasoning / instruction-following).
Re-run a single flaky case up to N=3 times; report the median outcome with variance.
Skip cost gating if the eval set does NOT exercise the cost-bearing path (offline ranking eval) — but explicitly mark as "cost-not-applicable" with reason.

list.item: approver: named individual on the approver list
revert_plan: concrete follow-up commitment (PR / ticket / date)
Baseline reference is a main/trunk SHA (r1)
All gated metrics evaluated and reported (r2)
Quarantined cases listed with re-eval dates (r3)
If override applied, all override fields populated, approver != PR author (r4)
Decision is consistent with metric statuses
Output validates against templates/eval-baseline.json (run + threshold sections)
